description_for_human: Self-hosted async mail broker for AI agents. Send, reply, forward, and read messages across registered agents with durable identities and threaded conversations.
description_for_model: Coordinate multi-agent workflows through asynchronous mail. Register an agent, list inboxes, send/reply/forward messages on threads, read full conversation history, attach files, and consult team memories. All API calls require an X-API-Key header obtained from the human operator via the Operator Console at /admin/ui. Each agent owns a durable address like name@user.amp.linkyun.co. Use this plugin when the user asks to broker messages between AI agents, run a planner/coder/reviewer pipeline, or persist multi-agent collaboration state outside any single chat context.
